items.name: 3.5% Card Processing Fee
items.description: 3.5% Card Processing Fee

items.name: Bestarc Cut60XP
items.description:
[Powerful Cutting Ability] Dual voltage 110/220V good for home, workshop and hardware shop use. Professional performance 1/2” clean cuts on Iron, Steel aluminum and copper with Inverter IGBT technology. Very powerful for DIY and heavy duty project. The Maximum cutting thickness is recommended to 9/16” (14mm)@35A 110V 50PSI; 4/5” (20mm)@60A 220V 65PSI. Dry and compressed air is required. Power breaker up to 40A@110V 35A; Up to 30A@220V 60A.
[Blow Back Pilot Arc]: bestarc plasma cutter features a blow back technology, Non-high-frequency pilot arc prevents hf signal interference and improves cutting stability. Blow-back pilot arc technology initiates the arc without touching the metal, while low-frequency arc maintenance reduces electrode burn during non-cutting, extending electrode and nozzle life.
[Air Sensor Technology]: The air sensor built into the machine displays the air pressure on the front panel of the machine. Users can adjust the air pressure manually through the air regulator (air pressure cannot be automatically adjusted). An air filter is installed at the back of the machine, equipped with a quick-connect 1/4 NPT air connector, ready for use right out of the box. Once connected to an air compressor, the recommended air pressure should be within 70 PSI, with a flow rate of 250 liters per minute.
[LED Screen Display]: The screen centrally displays parameters such as air pressure, voltage, and current, allowing users to understand the equipment status in real-time and adjust operations in a timely manner, improving operational efficiency. If the plasma cutter cannot work, the screen comes with an error code, making it easy to find out the problems.
[2T/4T/PA/PT Function]: Post time adjustable from 3-15s to cool the torch. Adjust the cooling time of the torch head to extend the service life of consumables. We recommend a cooling time of 4-8 seconds. The PA function allows pilot arc timing adjustment up to 15s; longer times are ideal for mesh cutting, shorter times help extend consumable life. 2T/4T automatic cutting release your finger.2T is a semi-automatic cutting control, and 4T is an automatic cutting control.

items.name: Elevate CNC APEX 4X10
items.description:
Elevate CNC Apex Series – Industrial CNC Router (4×10)

The Apex Series is a production-grade CNC router designed for cabinet shops, sign makers, and small manufacturers who require reliability, accuracy, and consistent performance in daily operation.

Included Features

Fully welded steel frame construction for rigidity and long-term accuracy

Precision linear motion system on all axes

Helical rack and pinion drive on X and Y axes

Precision ball screw–driven Z axis

High-torque industrial 1500w AC servo motor system with closed loop feedback and 5:1 gear reduction

Digital motor drivers for smooth, accurate motion control

12 HP air-cooled spindle, up to 24,000 RPM

Premium 12 HP variable frequency drive (VFD)

Automatic centralized lubrication system

Industrial limit switches on all axes

Emergency stop system

Production-ready cable management

Machine setup and testing prior to shipment

Controlled by Centroid CNC12 control software

Working Area

X Axis: 50 in

Y Axis: 121 in

Z Axis: 8 in

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 144 in

Width: 106 in

Height: 75 in

Performance

Max Rapid Travel Rate:
50,000 mm/min → 1,968 IPM

Max Working / Cutting Speed:
30,000 mm/min → 1,181 IPM (≈ 1,200 IPM)

Electrical Requirements

220V Single Phase

Two 30A circuits required (one for CNC, one for vacuum system)

(1) NEMA L6-30 for the CNC router

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC Ascent 4x4
items.description:
Elevate CNC Ascent Series – Entry-Level CNC Router (4×4)

The Ascent Series is an entry-level CNC router designed for hobbyists, makers, and small shops looking for an affordable, capable CNC system that operates entirely on standard household power while maintaining accuracy and rigidity.

Ascent is built as a true CNC platform—not a kit—while remaining accessible for users who do not require industrial electrical service.

Included Features

Welded steel lower frame for rigidity and stability

Aluminum extrusion upper frame and gantry assembly

Straight tooth rack and pinion drive system on X and Y axes

Precision ball screw–driven Z axis

NEMA 23 stepper motors rated at 325 oz-in

Matched digital motor drivers

Standard router-style spindle mount

Integrated relay-controlled router on/off switching

CNC control system powered by FluidNC

Designed for operation on standard 110V power

Spindle / Router

2.5 HP Skil router included

Router-based spindle system allows full machine operation on 110V power

Working Area

X Axis: 48 in

Y Axis: 48 in

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 55 in

Width: 35 in

Height: 19 in

Drive System

X / Y Axis: Straight tooth rack and pinion

Z Axis: Precision ball screw

Electrical Requirements

110V single-phase

Standard household outlet

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC BoreLine DH
items.description:
Elevate CNC BoreLine DH – Double-Head Side Hole Machine

The BoreLine DH is a purpose-built, double-head side hole drilling machine designed for high-accuracy, high-repeatability horizontal drilling operations in cabinet, furniture, and panel-based manufacturing.

This machine is optimized for production environments where speed, consistency, and precise hole placement are critical.

Machine Type

Double-head side hole drilling machine

Working Capacity

Maximum operating stroke: 110 in

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 130 in

Width: 43 in

Height: 47 in

Spindle System

Dual horizontal drilling spindles

Spindle Power: 3 HP per spindle

Number of Spindles: 2

Maximum Spindle Speed: 18,000 RPM

High-performance spindle drive system

Motion & Drive System

Industrial servo motor system

Servo power configuration: 1 HP + 0.5 HP

Precision linear actuation for accurate positioning

Linear Motion Components

20 mm precision linear guide rails on all motion axes

High-precision ball screw drive system

Worktable & Fixturing

PVC machining worktable

Pneumatic material clamping system using large-format air cylinders

Pneumatics & Sensors

Industrial pneumatic system for clamping and actuation

Laser probe for position detection and referencing

Integrated barcode scanning system for automated workflow compatibility

Lubrication & Safety

Automatic centralized lubrication system

Integrated limit and safety protection system

Electrical & Control

Dedicated CNC control system optimized for drilling operations

Industrial-grade electrical components

Machine wiring built to CE standards

Machine Weight

Approx. 1,100 lbs

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC ION 4x4
items.description:
The Elevate CNC Ion is a mid-tier CNC plasma table designed for serious hobbyists and light production users who want improved cut consistency, stronger motion components, and automatic material referencing while maintaining a compact 4×4 footprint.

Ion builds on the Spark platform with larger motors, stronger drive components, and a powered Z-axis with floating touch-off, making it better suited for repeat cutting and thicker materials.

Included Features

Fully welded all-steel frame and gantry for increased rigidity

NEMA 23 stepper motor system with matched motor drivers

20 mm wide timing belts on X and Y axes for higher torque capacity

Belt-driven linear motion for smooth and quiet operation

Motorized Z-axis with floating Z touch-off for automatic material sensing

Improved accuracy and repeatability compared to entry-level systems

Compact footprint ideal for garages and small fabrication shops

Control & User Interface

FluidNC-based CNC control system

Wi-Fi enabled for wireless file transfer and control

Bluetooth compatible for mobile device connectivity

Web-based control interface accessible from phone, tablet, or computer

No dedicated control computer required during operation

Software & File Compatibility

Compatible with most CNC plasma CAD/CAM software

Accepts standard G-code files

File transfer supported via:

Wi-Fi

USB

Bluetooth

Working Area

X Axis: 48 in

Y Axis: 48 in

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 72 in

Width: 63 in

Height: 44 in

Drive System

X / Y Axis: Belt-driven linear motion (20 mm belts)

Z Axis: Motorized Z-axis with floating Z touch-off

Plasma Cutter Compatibility

Compatible with blowback-start plasma cutters

Plasma cutters must provide a torch trigger interface

High-frequency (HF) start plasma cutters are NOT supported

Electrical Requirements

Standard household power for CNC control system

Plasma cutter power requirements depend on selected unit

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC Prime
items.description:
Elevate CNC Prime – Production-Grade CNC Plasma Table (4×4)

The Elevate CNC Prime is a production-ready CNC plasma table designed for shops that need higher speed, greater rigidity, and automated height control while still operating on standard household power.

Prime bridges the gap between hobby machines and industrial systems, offering a fully welded steel frame, rack-and-pinion motion on all axes, and integrated torch height control (THC) for consistent, repeatable cuts at high travel speeds.

Included Features

Fully welded steel frame for maximum rigidity and long-term durability

Aluminum extrusion gantry system for strength with reduced moving mass

Rack and pinion drive on X, Y, and Z axes

Motorized Z-axis with floating Z touch-off

Integrated Torch Height Control (THC) for automatic cut height adjustment

Capable of travel speeds up to 800 IPM

Designed for continuous use in production environments

Table Configuration Options

Standard slat bed configuration

Optional water table available for an additional $500

Control System & Connectivity

Powered by FluidNC CNC control system

Wi-Fi compatible for wireless connection

Web-based control interface accessible from phone, tablet, or computer

Software & File Compatibility

Compatible with most CNC plasma CAD/CAM software

Accepts standard G-code files generated by common CAM programs

Working Area

X Axis: 48 in

Y Axis: 48 in

Drive System

X / Y / Z Axes: Rack and pinion drive

Z Axis: Motorized with floating Z touch-off and THC

Performance

Maximum travel speed up to 800 inches per minute (IPM)

Optimized for smooth motion, fast rapids, and consistent cut quality

Plasma Cutter Compatibility

Compatible with blowback-start plasma cutters

Plasma cutter must provide a torch trigger interface

High-frequency (HF) start plasma cutters are NOT supported

Plasma power requirements depend on the selected plasma unit

Electrical Requirements

CNC system operates on standard 110V household power

Plasma cutter power requirements vary by model

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC Ridge 4×4
items.description:
Elevate CNC Ridge Series – Extrusion-Based CNC Router (4×4)

The Ridge Series is an extrusion-based CNC router designed for serious hobbyists, small shops, and growing businesses that need accuracy, flexibility, and dependable performance without stepping into a full industrial platform.

Included Features

Rigid aluminum extrusion frame construction

Precision linear motion system on all axes

Rack and pinion drive system on X and Y axes

Precision ball screw–driven Z axis

High-torque stepper motor system (multiple configurations available)

Digital motor drivers for smooth motion control

CNC control system powered by Centroid CNC12

Modular design allowing future upgrades and expansion

Working Area

X Axis: 49.5 in

Y Axis: 49.5 in

Z Axis: 8 in (12 in optional, minus spoilboard thickness)

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 67.5 in

Width: 67 in (77 in with extended gantry option)

Height: 43.4 in

Height with optional leg kit: 77.5 in

Performance

Maximum Cutting Speed

Up to 250 IPM (standard configuration)

Up to 500 IPM (high-torque configuration)

Maximum Rapid Speed

Up to 500 IPM (standard configuration)

Up to 1,000 IPM (high-torque configuration)

Drive System

X / Y Axis: Rack and pinion

Z Axis: Precision ball screw

Resolution

X / Y Axis: 0.0005 in

Z Axis: 0.0002 in

Electrical Requirements

220V single-phase

30A breaker recommended

Machine Weight

483 lbs (bench-mounted configuration)

616 lbs (with optional leg kit)

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

items.name: Elevate CNC Spark 2x2
items.description:
Elevate CNC Spark – Entry-Level CNC Plasma Table (2×2)

The Spark is an entry-level CNC plasma system designed for hobbyists, makers, and small shops looking for an affordable, compact plasma table with simple operation and flexible offline control.

Spark is built as a real CNC platform with a rigid hybrid frame while remaining approachable for first-time CNC plasma users.

Included Features

Welded steel lower frame for stability

Aluminum extrusion upper frame and gantry assembly

NEMA 17 stepper motor system with matched motor drivers

Manual Z-axis height adjustment

Integrated touch-screen CNC control

Offline operation with onboard controller

32-bit core control board for smooth and stable motion

Compact footprint ideal for garages and small shops

Control & User Interface

3.5-inch full-color touch screen display

Built-in controller allows offline cutting

Files loaded via TF card for stand-alone operation

No computer required during operation

Software & File Compatibility

Compatible with common CNC and laser software platforms

Supported file formats include:
JPG, PNG, BMP, G-code, GIF, SVG, NC, GC

Data transfer supported via:
Wi-Fi, USB cable, mobile app, or TF card

Working Area

X Axis: 24 in

Y Axis: 24 in

Overall Machine Dimensions

Length: 36 in

Width: 31 in

Height: 12 in

Drive System

X / Y Axis: Belt-driven linear motion

Z Axis: Manual adjustment

Plasma Compatibility

Compatible with blowback-start plasma cutters

Plasma units must provide a torch trigger port

High-frequency (HF) start plasma cutters are NOT supported

Optional Add-Ons

5W diode laser module for light engraving and marking applications

Electrical Requirements

Standard household power for CNC control

Plasma cutter power requirements depend on selected unit

Warranty & Support

1-Year Limited Warranty

Remote technical support included

Elevate CNC Summit ATC – Industrial CNC Router

The Summit ATC builds on the proven Summit industrial platform and adds automated tool changing for increased efficiency, repeatability, and reduced cycle times in production environments.

Summit ATC Enhancements

6 HP (4.5 kW) automatic tool change spindle, up to 24,000 RPM

Matched high-performance variable frequency drive (VFD)

8-position linear tool rack

BT30 tool holders with ER25 collets

Automatic tool length setter for accurate, repeatable tool changes

Integrated pneumatic system for ATC operation

items.name: Elevate CNC Summit Lathe
items.description:
Elevate CNC Summit Lathe
Model

Summit Lathe 60×20

Working Area

Maximum turning length: 59 in (1500 mm)

Maximum turning diameter: 19.7 in (500 mm)

Optional extended lengths: 79 in (2000 mm), 98 in (2500 mm), 118 in (3000 mm)

Optional max diameters: 15.7 in (400 mm), 19.7 in (500 mm)

Drive & Motion System

Linear motion: Taiwan Hiwin square linear rails

Ballscrews: Taiwan TBI precision ballscrews

Drivers: Yako high-torque stepper drivers

Transmission: Precision ballscrew-driven axes for smooth, repeatable motion

Motor & Speed

Main motor: 7.4 HP (5.5 kW) asynchronous motor

Rotational speed: 0–3000 RPM, electronically controlled

Spindle: Not applicable (lathe-based turning system)

Accuracy & Performance

Positioning accuracy: ±0.002 in (±0.05 mm)

Designed for repeatable production turning, not hobby-grade work

Control System

Controller: 1000TC industrial control system

Interface: USB-based, user-friendly operation

Software compatibility: CorelDRAW, ArtCAM, AutoCAD, and other industry-standard CAD/CAM software

Electrical

Input voltage options:

220V single-phase

220V three-phase

(Voltage configured based on customer location and shop power)

Machine Dimensions & Weight

Overall dimensions:

122 in × 59 in × 59 in (3100 × 1500 × 1500 mm)

Machine weight: ≈ 3,530 lbs (1600 kg)

Standard Function

CNC wood lathing / turning


Heavy-duty chuck system

Construction & Key Features

One-piece cast iron bed, stress-relieved through high-temperature annealing and vibration treatment for long-term stability and zero deformation.

Precision motion system using Taiwan Hiwin rails and TBI ballscrews ensures high accuracy, rigidity, and extended service life.

High-torque Yako-driven stepper system delivers smooth acceleration, fast positioning, and consistent cutting performance.

Designed for production shops, furniture makers, stair builders, column and spindle manufacturers

items.name: Remote Jog Wheel Pendant
items.description:
Take the control to where the work is! A game changing tool, the Centroid Wireless MPG handwheel CNC Control pendant allows the operator to set up jobs and tools conveniently and precisely remotely. No software or drivers to install. Plug and Play with Centroid CNC12 Pro CNC software, just plug in the included USB transmitter/receiver and start using it! Perfect for all types of Mills, Lathes, Routers and other specialty CNC machines. Control up to Six Axes from the palm of your hand! Multiple units can be used in the same location without issue.

- On-the-fly Feed Rate override
- On-the-fly Spindle Speed override
- 6 axis DRO display (4 axis on main screen, 2 axis on sub menu)
- 6 axis MPG and continuous jogging control
- Robust wireless communication
- No software drivers to install
- Free Tech Support via CNC Forum
- Hanger bracket mount w/ magnets
- Smooth motion
- Long range wireless
- Robust CENTROID developed drivers
- Takes 2 AA batteries 
- run time approx. 1 month
- USB Plug and Play Transmitter / Receiver
- Rubber case protector
- Tactile Feedback domed buttons 
- w/ gold plated contacts
- High quality 3M Overlay
